message:
chore(beads): create 18 beads for hardcoded-constants audit findings

4 epics, 11 tasks/features, 3 docs covering:
- Dynamic version strings (P1) — CI guard, blurb coupling
- Configurable analysis params (P3) — weights, limits, thresholds
- Robustness improvements (P2) — named constants, filter clarity, docs
- Test stability (P2) — relative dates, history isolation

Dependency graph ensures config infrastructure precedes per-module
configurability, and documentation precedes implementation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
